params.initialMessage:
Add explicit back-transitions beyond the existing review-code→execute-task (reject) path: skip a step, undo (revert an approved step to rework it), and mark-blocked transitions. These would be new commands or tool actions that let users intervene in the workflow — e.g., /pio-skip-step, /pio-undo-step, /pio-mark-blocked.

This builds on the elevate-transition-state-machine work (src/state-machine.ts). The state machine should handle non-linear flows: stepping backward, blocking intermediate steps, and resuming after unblocking.
